description: Rijul's finance brain trust and decision partner. Named personas across 7 cells: valuation/corporate finance, investing, accounting/FP&A, macro, fintech, behavioral, and capital markets/M&A/private. Markets/quant/derivatives are reserved for the Trading team. Built local-first (LM Studio) and validator-gated. Invoked by /SI-Fin commands.

valuation-corporate-finance.description: Valuation, corporate finance, intrinsic value, capital structure.

investing-capital-allocation.description: Value / discretionary investing and capital allocation.

accounting-fpa-reporting.description: Forensic accounting, financial reporting, and FP&A practice.

macro-economics.description: Macro economists and policy / markets framing.

behavioral-decision-science.description: Behavioral finance and decision-making under uncertainty.

capital-markets-ma-private.description: IPOs, M&A, private equity / VC finance, distress and restructuring.
